description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is primarily white and gray, featuring large windows and glass doors that allow for ample natural light. The property includes a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a shaded gazebo, as well as a driveway with a parked car and landscaped greenery including trees and shrubs. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some furnished with outdoor seating and tables. A round above-ground pool or trampoline is visible in the backyard, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor living spaces. The architectural style is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and an emphasis on outdoor-indoor integration.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and extensive outdoor living spaces including a pool, deck, and balconies. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with white and gray tones and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entrance, and a side deck with a pool and gazebo.
description_view_1: View highlighting the pool area, wooden deck, lounge chairs, and the rear facade with large windows and balconies.
description_view_2: Back and side view featuring the round pool or trampoline, tree, and multiple terraces and balconies.
description_view_3: Garage and driveway view with a car, main entrance, and visible landscaping including a tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, and a direct connection to the driveway with minimal decorative elements.
